'''Prentiss''' was a crewmember of the [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|''Consular''-class space cruiser]] that crash-landed on an unnamed [[Planet/Legends|planet]] many years before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

Six months after the battle, [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] discovered the cruiser and came across a holorecording that reported of Prentiss' death. He was killed by a native creature soon after the crash-landing.

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 22|''Empire'' 22]] {{1stm}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
